LPDP.name: LPDP (Indonesian Government)
LPDP.notes: Must return to Indonesia for 2+ years

age_limit.notes: 35 for mid-career professionals, no limit for fresh graduates
No strict age limit, preference for mid-career professionals
No strict age limit, preference for younger candidates

EPFL Excellence.name: EPFL Excellence Fellowships
EPFL Excellence.notes: CHF 10,000 per semester stipend, tuition already low

A.name: Indonesia Career (Return Required)
A.description: Take LPDP or similar scholarship, return to Indonesia for 2+ years

B.name: International Career (No Return)
B.description: Focus on scholarships without return requirements, pursue international career immediately

C.name: Hybrid Strategy
C.description: Take LPDP, return 2+ years, then pursue international career
pros: Fulfill commitment then free to pursue international
Elite degree helps with future visa

optimal_combinations.notes: Best overall: Elite education, fully funded, but must return
Best value: Top education, high salary, minimal cost

root.question: Where do you want to build your career after graduation?

path_a_check.question: Can you commit to returning to Indonesia for 2+ years?

path_a_recommend.result: PATH A: LPDP → Top University → Return to Indonesia
path_a_recommend.action: Apply for LPDP, Australia Awards, Chevening

path_b_check.question: Can you afford partial self-funding if needed?

path_b_usa.result: PATH B: Target USA (highest salary) or Europe
path_b_usa.action: Apply for Erasmus Mundus, ETH ESOP, Spärck AI, consider USA with partial funding

path_b_europe.result: PATH B: Focus on fully-funded Europe options
path_b_europe.action: Apply for Erasmus Mundus, ETH ESOP, DAAD, Spärck AI

hybrid_check.question: Are you willing to return to Indonesia for 2+ years?

hybrid_recommend.result: PATH C: HYBRID - LPDP → Return 2+ years → Then international
hybrid_recommend.action: Apply to BOTH Path A (LPDP) and Path B (Erasmus, ETH ESOP) scholarships

urgent.action: Apply for Spärck AI (Imperial deadline: March 4, 2026)

high.action: Apply for Erasmus Mundus EMAI (applications open)

medium.action: Connect with Indonesian students at target universities

warnings.title: CONFLICTING GOALS
warnings.message: You want international career but are willing to return. If you take LPDP → MUST return 2+ years. Consider HYBRID strategy.

warnings.title: GPA CONCERN
warnings.message: Your GPA may limit access to top-tier programs. Strengthen with research, work experience, strong essays.

warnings.title: ENGLISH PROFICIENCY
warnings.message: Most programs require IELTS 6.5-7.5 or TOEFL 90-100+. Take test soon to know baseline.

warnings.title: FUNDING CONSTRAINT
warnings.message: International career path has fewer fully-funded options. Focus on: Erasmus Mundus, ETH ESOP, DAAD, Spärck AI.

metadata.notes: All costs are annual unless specified. Salaries are post-graduation estimates for AI/ML roles.
